characters.name: Bradley Mortin
characters.description: Bradley Mortin Bradley"Brad" Mortin(voiced by Keith Miller) is Mimi's 9-year-old brother who knows that Mimi's plans always have flaws.

characters.name: Bradley Mortin
characters.description: Bradley Mortin Bradley"Brad" Mortin(voiced by Keith Miller) is Mimi's 9-year-old brother who knows that Mimi's plans always have flaws.

characters.name: Brock Wickersham
characters.description: Brock Wickershamis a recurring character in theTV series. Brock is a bully who likes to pull pranks on his classmates, especially Herbert Finkle. He isn't very smart, and his classmates only see him as an annoyance when he's messing with them, otherwise he generally gets along with them. He mainly hangs out with his brotherBuddy, his friend Lodeman, and occasionallyRussell. Despite his weight, he's quite active and enjoys playing outside with his friends. Brock is 12 years old, he has a buzz cut, a thick unibrow and wears braces on his upper teeth. He's overweight, yet strong. He wears a red flannel shirt over a black t-shirt with an 8 ball pattern, as well as blue jeans and sneakers.

characters.name: Budrick "Buddy" Wickersham
characters.description: Budrick "Buddy" Wickershamis a recurring character in the TV series. Similar tohis brother, Buddy is a bully who enjoys pulling pranks on his classmates. His best friends are Brock and Lodeman, both of whom he is a few years younger than. He's in the same grade asMimi's younger brotherBradley. Buddy is 10 years old, he has frizzy hair, freckles above his nose and his front teeth are a little crooked. He's overweight like his brother. He wears a green t-shirt with a skull pattern, as well as gray pants and sneakers. He has two bandages in a cross on his left elbow.

characters.name: Crabdingle Twins
characters.description: Dakota CrabdingleandMontana Crabdingleare the characters ofThe Stepford Twins. The twins named after two states of America.

characters.name: Crabdingle Twins
characters.description: Dakota CrabdingleandMontana Crabdingleare the characters ofThe Stepford Twins. The twins named after two states of America.

characters.name: Elaine Pituskin
characters.description: Elaine PituskinisMimi's sensible, excited, and girly best friend with enough common sense. Elaine is an animal/nature lover, owning many pets. She can be temperamental and argue with Mimi at times, but she always looks up to Mimi as her best friend, in turn, Mimi respects her all of it Same age as Mimi and Russell, Elaine has light brown skin, black eyes and dark hair in pigtails. She wears earrings, a pink hoodie, grey sweatpants (with stripes) and white sneakers. She is of unknown ethnicity.

characters.name: Jason Mortin
characters.description: Jason Mortinis Mimi's brother who thinks of himself as an on-the-edge rebel.

characters.name: Jason Mortin
characters.description: Jason Mortinis Mimi's brother who thinks of himself as an on-the-edge rebel.

characters.name: Marv
characters.description: He's the father of Mimi, Jason, and Bradley. He's the only hippie who never ate meat.

characters.name: Mimi Mortin
characters.description: Miriam "Mimi" Mortinis the main protagonist of theTV cartoon.She appears in every episode. Mimi is a smart, ambitious, reckless and lovely young girl in the 6th grade. She is optimistic and has a wild imagination with a beautiful talent. She is always willing to help and solve any problem that she may encounter all of time with awkward antics and escapades. Although her plans may not always work out the way she expects them because she is never right, Mimi receives a lot of help from her best friends (ElaineandRussell), her family, and even her rivals (Sincerity), and finds a way to solve any problem she created.

characters.name: Russell Van Eden
characters.description: Russell Van Eden(voiced by Rhys Huber, later Noel Callahan) isMimi's male friend is of Dutch-Canadian heritage. Russell is a sports lover, although he is a little clumsy. He has skills with his video camera and aspires to be a film director. He is shown to have a crush on Sincerity early in the series, but his interest on her fades away by the end, instead hinting at being attracted to Mimi. Russell's same age as Mimi and Elaine. He has blond hair and blue eyes. He wears hockey stripes, cargo shorts, and sneakers.

characters.name: Saffron Mortin (mom)
characters.description: Saffron Mortin(voiced by Ellen Kennedy) is the mother ofMimi,Jason, andBradley. She's the only vegan who always feeds her children vegetables. Saffron has short brown hair, lipstick, sunglasses, earrings, blue blouse, red capris, sandals.

characters.name: Sincerity Travers
characters.description: Sincerity Traversis the main antagonist and the arch-nemesis ofMimi Mortinin theTV cartoon. Sincerity was younger, along with Mimi were best friends, but they grew apart as they getting older and by the start of the show, they are rivals. Sincerity's new best friend is a girl, whose name is Hayley Kinaschuk. Sincerity is 12 years old and has blue eyes along dyed short pink hair with two sidelocks. She wears makeup, green hairclips, a collared yellow shirt (that shows her stomach) with an orange vest, orange pants and green sneakers. Despite her name and beauty, Sincerity is a spoiled, bad rich girl who wants anything to be done her way whenever she needs it.
characters.personality_section: Despite her name and beauty, Sincerity is a spoiled, bad rich girl who wants anything to be done her way whenever she needs it.
